download_policy.notes: Large files stay under data/, which is ignored by Git. Record accession, checksum and processed conversion scripts instead of committing raw data.

primary_candidates.title: Retinoic acid induces human gastruloids with posterior embryo-like structures
primary_candidates.why_it_matters: Contains conventional/RA gastruloids plus LDN-treated, TBX6-KO and PAX3-KO RA-gastruloid samples; directly supports RA/BMP/TF response transfer.
required_processing: Map human genes to mouse orthologs before transfer into mouse embryo manifold.
Define NTC/untreated as control and LDN/TBX6-KO/PAX3-KO as perturbation labels.

primary_candidates.title: Inter-gastruloid heterogeneity revealed by single cell transcriptomics time course
primary_candidates.role: mouse gastruloid validation and organoid heterogeneity negative-control model
primary_candidates.why_it_matters: Provides mouse gastruloid day 3-5 time course with individual organoid barcoding; useful for testing donor/organoid-level response-recovery false positives.
required_processing: Preserve gastruloid identity as donor/organoid covariate.
Use WNT-biased versus neural-biased organoids as heterogeneity-aware validation.

primary_candidates.title: Single-cell and spatial transcriptomics reveal somitogenesis in gastruloids
primary_candidates.why_it_matters: Links mouse gastruloid scRNA-seq with spatial/tomo-seq, useful for validating transferred mesoderm/neural/somite responses and niche proxies.
required_processing: Use mouse gastruloid samples for embryo-model validation.
Use spatial/tomo-seq axes to test niche-proxy assumptions.

normal_manifold_validation.title: Pijuan-Sala mouse gastrulation and early organogenesis atlas
normal_manifold_validation.notes: Use Bioconductor MouseGastrulationData for annotated count matrices and metadata; atlas covers E6.5-E8.5 and includes chimaera/knockout-related resources.

normal_manifold_validation.title: Mouse Organogenesis Cell Atlas
normal_manifold_validation.notes: Use after primary response-recovery pipeline is stable because the dataset is large.

gonad_niche_validation.title: Prenatal and neonatal mouse gonad/ovary single-cell atlas
gonad_niche_validation.notes: Supports germ-cell and gonadal somatic niche analyses around E11.5-P5.

gonad_niche_validation.title: Single-nucleus multiomics of murine fetal gonads
gonad_niche_validation.notes: Use for Tbx4-Glis3 niche-aware interpretation if gene coverage and cell annotations are suitable.
